subcodes.first_line: The radiant light from the Sun of Truth encircles thy fragrant grave, and the clouds of pardon and forgiveness shower upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: النور الساطع من شمس الحقیقه یحف جدثک المعطر و سحائب العفو و الغفران تمطر علی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @soul; spirit after death, @eulogies; reminiscences
